name: markdown preview renders table in web view
comment: Opens a .md file with an HTML table, toggles the preview on, and captures a screenshot of the rendered WebView. With autoShowPreviewForMarkdown defaulting true (v2.7.4+), the preview shows immediately; the editorTextView may be hidden, so we skip asserting its value and instead wait for the WebView directly. For builds where the default is still false (pre-v2.7.4), the show-preview menu step is a no-op toggle. Requires staged /tmp/table-test.md fixture. ⚠ BLIND SPOT: --no-auto-preview enters through the editor-visible path, so this plan cannot catch any bug that only occurs when the preview is auto-opened at launch — the state EVERY Markdown document is in by default. That is a deliberate tradeoff (this plan must drive the editor), not an oversight. The auto-preview path is covered by preview-copy-test.json and drop-files-onto-preview.json; any new preview behavior needs coverage there too, not here.
